name: mule-cli
description: Search and download files from the eMule ed2k/Kad networks. Wraps the `mule` CLI. Requires mule-cli to be installed on the machine first (see https://github.com/dimix/mule-cli).
long_description: Exposes the mule ed2k/Kad downloader as MCP tools: ensure_engine, net, search, download, downloads, cancel, commit, download_path. The MLDonkey engine runs locally in Docker; this connector assumes mule-cli's install.sh has already set that up.

tools.name: mule_ensure_engine
tools.description: Start the local MLDonkey engine if needed.

tools.name: mule_download
tools.description: Download result ids from the last search.
